headlines.title: Iran launches missile attacks on UAE, Bahrain and Saudi Arabia
headlines.summary: Iran fired missiles prompting sirens in Dubai and Bahrain while Saudi Arabia downed two drones; five pro-Iran militants died in Iraq airstrike. Gulf states face heightened risks; more retaliation expected. Escalates regional war impacting global oil security.

headlines.title: US President Trump threatens Iran with massive strikes over Hormuz blockade
headlines.summary: Trump warns of harder US hits if Iran blocks Strait of Hormuz oil flow following Revolutionary Guards threat to halt exports. Global trade and energy markets affected; potential for wider conflict rises. Threatens further economic disruption worldwide.

framings.angle: Liveblog covers Trump warning and Iran Guards oil export threat amid ongoing war
Highlights Trump twenty-times harder strike threat plus Iranian footballers asylum in Australia

headlines.title: Kentucky Army Sgt. Benjamin Pennington dies as seventh US casualty in Iran war
headlines.summary: 26-year-old Sgt. Pennington succumbed to wounds from March 1 attack on Saudi base. US military families and forces impacted; investigations continue. Raises toll in expanding conflict pressuring US strategy.

headlines.title: Iran war drives up global energy and fertilizer prices
headlines.summary: Conflict spikes costs threatening food shortages in poor nations like Pakistan and complicating central bank inflation fights. Consumers worldwide face higher bills; G7 weighs interventions. Undermines economic recovery efforts.

headlines.title: Human Rights Watch accuses Israel of white phosphorus use over Lebanon town
headlines.summary: HRW verified images of airburst munitions over Yohmor homes on March 3 causing fires. Lebanese civilians and responders affected; Israel may investigate claims. Fuels war crimes debates in multi-front conflict.

headlines.title: NASA and SpaceX launch four astronauts to retrieve stuck ISS crew
headlines.summary: Crew-10 including McClain, Ayers, Onishi and Peskov lifted off Friday from Florida reaching station Saturday. Wilmore and Williams return after nine months; routine rotations resume. Boosts US space program reliability.

headlines.title: G7 finance ministers agree to measures stabilizing oil prices over $100
headlines.summary: Ministers and IEA discuss supporting energy supplies amid surge. Global consumers and economies hit by volatility; releases from reserves possible. Counters Iran war disruptions to markets.

headlines.title: Israel allows Palestinians to stream back into northern Gaza
headlines.summary: Displaced residents cross military zone bisecting enclave after hostage release breakthrough. Northern Gaza population affected; rebuilding efforts begin. Eases humanitarian strains post-deal.
headlines.previousContext: Israel permits crossing of military zone after deadlock broken on hostages

headlines.title: Rwanda-backed rebels overrun Goma troops entering safe-haven city
headlines.summary: Gunfire and shelling displace over one million into city aid hub. Congolese forces and residents impacted; UN aids refugees. Heightens eastern Congo instability.
headlines.previousContext: Rebels advance past troops with reports of gunfire and one million-plus inside city

headlines.title: NATO mounts coordinated response to Baltic Sea deep-sea cable sabotage
headlines.summary: Alliance acts after another cable severed in suspected campaign against infrastructure. European energy and data links threatened; patrols increase. Signals heightened alliance vigilance.
headlines.previousContext: Additional cable cut prompts first NATO-led infrastructure protection measures
